text.title: Video Gen Tools — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON returned by VideoGenerationService.generate(). Carries local_path, archived_path (permanent storage), provider chain (primary + fallbacks tried), per-attempt metadata, ffprobe summary.

section.title: JSON Schema
section.code: { "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema", "$id": "faion://video-gen-tools/output.schema.json", "type": "object", "required": ["status", "local_path", "primary_provider", "providers_tried", "duration_s", "aspect_ratio", "seed", "prompt_hash"], "properties": { "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["ok", "failed", "all_providers_failed"]}, "local_path": {"type": "string"}, "archived_path": {"type": "string", "description": "S3/GCS URI; populated after archive step"}, "primary_provider": {"type": "string", "enum": ["runway", "luma", "replicate", "pika"]}, "providers_tried": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "required": ["provider", "task_id", "status"], "properties": { "provider": {"type": "string"}, "task_id": {"type": "string"}, "status": {"type": "string"}, "error": {"type": "string"}, "duration_s": {"type": "number"} }}}, "duration_s": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0}, "aspect_ratio": {"type": "string"}, "seed": {"type": "integer"}, "prompt_hash": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$"}, "model_hash": {"type": "string", "description": "pinned Replicate sha or Runway model id"}, "retries": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0}, "ffprobe": {"type": "object"}, "error": {"type": "string"} }, "additionalProperties": false }

list.item: providers_tried — array of every provider attempted in order, including primary; non-empty.
primary_provider — first provider attempted (may differ from the one that returned status==ok).
archived_path — present whenever status==ok and the archival step ran; absent otherwise.
retries — count across all providers; used for cost / budget audits.

antipattern.description: status "ok" without local_path AND without archived_path.
antipattern.reason: No durable artifact exists; downstream cannot consume the result.

antipattern.description: providers_tried entry without task_id (or with a task_id from a different provider).
antipattern.reason: Cross-provider id mix violates rule r4-provider-id-isolation; debugging becomes impossible.
Means the dispatch step never ran; agent should not have reached this branch.

example.note: Invalid: status ok with empty local_path and no archived_path; providers_tried empty; prompt_hash not sha256.

list.item: At least one of local_path or archived_path is non-empty when status==ok.
Every providers_tried[i].task_id is provider-prefixed or stored alongside provider value.
ffprobe is present when status==ok and shows duration > 0.
